title: probability_of_backtest_overfitting
description: Probability of Backtest Overfitting (PBO) via CSCV method

backtest_returns_matrix.description: T x N matrix (T observations, N strategies)

n_splits.description: Number of equal bins (must be even, >= 2)

rank_logits.description: Array of log(rank/(N-rank)) for each split

performance_degradation.description: Mean performance degradation from IS to OOS

references: Bailey, Borwein, López de Prado, Zhu (2015)
'The Probability of Backtest Overfitting', Journal of Computational Finance
